hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not fp.endswith('.py'):
    sys.exit(0)
cwd = data.get('cwd', '')
venv_bin = os.path.join(cwd, '.venv', 'bin')
ruff = os.path.join(venv_bin, 'ruff')
mypy = os.path.join(venv_bin, 'mypy')
print(f'[hook] ruff: {fp}', flush=True)
r1 = subprocess.run([ruff, 'check', fp, '--fix'], capture_output=True, text=True)
r2 = subprocess.run([ruff, 'format', fp], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(f'[hook] mypy: {fp}', flush=True)
r3 = subprocess.run([mypy, fp, '--ignore-missing-imports'], capture_output=True, text=True)
out = '\n'.join(filter(None, [r1.stdout.strip(), r1.stderr.strip(), r2.stderr.strip(), r3.stdout.strip(), r3.stderr.strip()]))
if out:
    print(out, flush=True)
if r1.returncode != 0 or r3.returncode != 0:
    sys.exit(1)
"
